title: Utility to link source files as code artifacts in a session
purpose: Provides a shared helper to create linked code snippets from disk files, enabling cross-file navigation and global search functionality.

methods.name: linkFile
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, filePath: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Extract the file name from the file path for use as the snippet name.
Construct an empty envelope object with metadata for the linked file.
Create a new snippet in the session with the file name and empty envelope.
IF the snippet creation fails, throw an error indicating failure.
Sync the actual file content from disk to the newly created snippet.
Return the ID of the newly created snippet.
